introSection: Rum Runner is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Twinlakes Park in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. It opened in 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Figure-eight layout. Orange track, silver supports.

fullText:
Rum Runner is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Twinlakes Park in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. It opened in 2018.

Figure-eight layout. Orange track, silver supports.

Each row sits facing back-to-back.
